title: Obsidian tools and more
description: This project adds a full set of high-durability, fire-resistant Obsidian tools, weapons, and armor to Minecraft.
body:
## ObsidianToolsAndMore

****ObsidianToolsAndMore**** is a Fabric mod that introduces a powerful new tier of equipment crafted from Obsidian, providing a sleek and durable alternative for late-game survival.

### Features
This mod adds a comprehensive set of Obsidian-based gear to the game:

****Standard Tools:**** High-performance Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, and Hoe.

****Combat Weapons:**** A sharp Obsidian Sword and a unique Obsidian Spear featuring custom stabbing animations.

****Protective Armor:**** A full suit of Obsidian Armor, including Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots.

****Specialty Items:**** Obsidian Horse Armor and Obsidian Nautilus Armor for your companions and utility.

****Special Ability:**** Grants fire and lava resistance when all armor pieces are worn.


### Why download this mod?
The standout feature of all Obsidian equipment in this mod is its total fire resistance. Your tools and armor will not burn in lava or fire, making them the perfect choice for Nether exploration or deep-slate mining. With durability and efficiency stats that provide a meaningful upgrade over standard materials, it offers both a functional advantage and a premium dark aesthetic.

### Technical Information
- Loader: Fabric
- Minecraft Version: Optimized for 26.1+
- Dependencies: Requires the Fabric API to be installed.
- Compatibility: All items are fireproof and integrated into the creative menu for easy access.
